'''Gayman Neeloid''' was a [[S'kytri]]<ref name="GM1" /> [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who wrote the song ''[[The Sound of Her Wings]]''.<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

==Behind the Scenes==
This character appears to be a [[Tuckerization]] of the name of the British writer [[wikipedia:Neil Gaiman|Neil Gaiman]]. [[Barbara Hambly]], author of ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', also included another Tuckerization of Neil Gaiman's name in the planet [[Neelgaimon]], in her first ''Star Wars'' novel, ''[[Children of the Jedi]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
